---
name: Research and Algorithm Design
about: Use Playwright and web search for API syntax research and algorithm design support.
---

## Goal
Continuously improve API usage and project algorithm quality with evidence-based research.

## Use this skill when
- You need current API syntax/examples from official docs.
- You need structured research inputs for trading/ML strategy logic.

## Operational checklist
1. Use web search to gather and compare authoritative references.
2. Use Playwright for reproducible browser-based validation when needed.
3. Log selected specs and assumptions into workflow artifacts or repository docs.
4. Convert findings into actionable implementation tasks.
